title: Creamy Tacos
description: A Mexican-inspired dish featuring creamy tacos filled with a delicious blend of flavors. This recipe combines the richness of creamy sauce with the bold taste of tacos.
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a pan at 160°F, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until softened.
Stir in the creamy sauce and bring to a simmer.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tacos shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture into the shells.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
